name: Bayesian Linear Baseline
notes: Bayesian linear control benchmark.

name: Equal-Weight Baseline
notes: Control benchmark for the long-only universe.

name: Linear Return Baseline
notes: Plain linear regression baseline for comparison.

name: Random-Walk Momentum Baseline
notes: Simple momentum sign baseline aligned to the checklist.

name: Bayesian Linear Return Forecaster
notes: Price-only proxy for the return forecaster. Bayesian confidence gate active.

name: Bayesian Factor Regression
notes: Proxy factor regression on price-derived factor features.

name: Bayesian State Space Price-Vol Model
notes: Proxy state-space volatility timing model.

name: Bayesian State Space Regime Detector
notes: Direct regime-routing path already supported in code.

name: Bayesian Hierarchical Fundamental Model
notes: Fundamental hierarchy proxy using delayed technical structure.

name: Bayesian Black-Litterman with ML Views
notes: Proxy view fusion via Bayesian linear posterior. Bayesian confidence gate active.

name: LSTM Return Forecaster
notes: Sequence model over rolling technical features.

name: MLP Cross-Sectional Ranker
notes: Flat MLP over cross-sectional features.

name: Transformer Return Forecaster
notes: Transformer encoder over rolling technical window.

name: Temporal Fusion Transformer (TFT)
notes: TFT proxy: LSTM encoder + Transformer head over factor features.

name: Multimodal Fusion (Price + Macro Proxy)
notes: Two-branch MLP fusing price-derived and macro-proxy feature halves.

name: Factor Autoencoder Latent Alpha
notes: Autoencoder learns a latent factor representation; alpha from the head.

name: Graph Neural Stock Relation Model
notes: GNN proxy treating features as node attributes with message passing.

name: PatchTST Time-Series Baseline
notes: PatchTST segmented Transformer over rolling patches.

name: Technical Indicator + LightGBM Ranker
notes: Current executable baseline.

name: Factor + LightGBM Cross-Sectional Model
notes: Cross-sectional factor proxy using price-derived factor features.

name: News Sentiment + LightGBM Event Model
notes: Event proxy driven by price shocks because dedicated news feeds are not yet wired.

name: Fundamental + Technical + LightGBM Hybrid
notes: Hybrid proxy on technical and cross-sectional inputs.

name: Residual Momentum + LightGBM
notes: Residual momentum proxy on market-relative signals.

name: Correlation Graph + LightGBM Overlay
notes: Graph proxy via rolling correlation structure.

name: Regime Detector + LightGBM Stack
notes: Direct regime-gated alpha path.

name: Fundamental Delay-Aware LightGBM Model
notes: Delay-aware proxy that enforces lagged features.

name: Technical + Factor + XGBoost with CVaR Overlay
notes: LightGBM proxy for the boosted-tree + CVaR shortlist slot.

name: News Shock Filter + Momentum Engine
notes: Shock-filtered momentum proxy with price shock inputs.

name: Technical + LGBM + Bayesian Risk Overlay
notes: Operational overlay baseline used as an extra comparison point.

name: Stochastic Volatility Timing Model
notes: Volatility timing proxy using the shared volatility features.

name: Jump Diffusion Crash Filter
notes: Crash filter proxy on price-shock features.

name: Mean-Reverting Volatility Allocation Model
notes: Pure sizing proxy without a directional base model.

name: Jump Filter + Momentum Engine
notes: Momentum proxy with a jump-risk gate.
